raw_consumer_statement: Someone used my Best Buy credit card and ordered things. I am not sure what they ordered. Im not sure how they ordered the items or picked up the items but Best Buy are asking {$2700.00} off me. Ive explained Ive never used the card, especially for that huge amount. Credit card number XXXX name on the card is XXXX XXXX XXXX. I look forward to your response. Many thanks, XXXX XXXX.
